title: Ender Dragon Egg Respawn
description: Every time the Ender Dragon died, drop the egg
body:
[**![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8fd2f0f5-1266-429b-b91c-d015a2026f31.webp)**](https://blocklegend001.dev/bh)

 This mod let spawn a new Dragon Egg every time the Ender Dragon is killed

Mods like YUNG's Better End Island are not compatible cause they change the behaviour of the respawning of the egg
